creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
jgh         2012-04-14 19:23:25 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    math                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    math/py-fiat         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Add new port: math/py-fiat
  
  The FInite element Automatic Tabulator FIAT supports generation of arbitrary
  order instances of the Lagrange elements on lines, triangles, and tetrahedra.
  
  WWW:    https://launchpad.net/fiat
  
  PR:     ports/166910
  Submitted by:   jwbacon@tds.net
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.773     +1 -0      ports/math/Makefile
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/math/py-fiat/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/math/py-fiat/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/math/py-fiat/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +88 -0     ports/math/py-fiat/pkg-plist (new)
